requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Back-Office Communication for Congo-Brazzaville Deployments
requirement_topic.zh: 刚果（布）部署的OCPP互操作与后台通信
requirement_topic.zht: 剛果（布）部署的OCPP互操作與後台通訊

summary.en: Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo) has no established public EV charging network or national charging management platform as of 2026. However, any networked charger deployment intended for future-proofing, donor-funded infrastructure, or integration with regional or international charge-point operators would be expected to use OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office communication, consistent with Congo-Brazzaville's IEC-aligned Francophone regulatory tradition. OCPP is the international open standard for communication between charge-point equipment and central management systems, enabling remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, load management, and billing. Any project with a network operator or international donor would likely require OCPP compliance; specific OCPP version requirements should be confirmed with the project owner or operator. EMC requirements under IEC 61000 apply to any electrical equipment imported or installed in Congo-Brazzaville, consistent with IEC-aligned Francophone standards.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，刚果（布）（刚果共和国）尚无已建立的公共电动汽车充电网络或国家充电管理平台。但任何旨在面向未来、受捐助方资助的基础设施项目，或与区域及国际充电点运营商集成的联网充电桩部署，预计将采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）进行后台通信，与刚果（布）IEC体系法语区监管传统一致。OCPP是充电点设备与中央管理系统通信的国际开放标准，支持远程监控、故障报告、访问控制、负载管理和计费。任何涉及网络运营商或国际捐助方的项目均可能要求OCPP合规；具体OCPP版本要求应向项目业主或运营商确认。IEC 61000 EMC要求适用于在刚果（布）进口或安装的任何电气设备，与IEC体系法语区标准一致。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，剛果（布）（剛果共和國）尚無已建立的公共電動汽車充電網絡或國家充電管理平台。但任何旨在面向未來、受捐助方資助的基礎設施項目，或與區域及國際充電點運營商集成的聯網充電樁部署，預計將採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）進行後台通訊，與剛果（布）IEC體系法語區監管傳統一致。OCPP是充電點設備與中央管理系統通訊的國際開放標準，支持遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制、負載管理和計費。任何涉及網絡運營商或國際捐助方的項目均可能要求OCPP合規；具體OCPP版本要求應向項目業主或運營商確認。IEC 61000 EMC要求適用於在剛果（布）進口或安裝的任何電氣設備，與IEC體系法語區標準一致。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers (OCPP 1.6 / 2.0.1 most common internationally)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility requirements for electrical equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging (CCS2 stack)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based or proprietary back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP signaling rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2. For EMC, Chinese chargers are typically documented against GB standards rather than IEC 61000 series, requiring additional EMC test evidence for IEC-market deployments.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用基于OCPP或私有的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP信号，而非IEC 62196 Type 2所要求的PP/CP信号。在EMC方面，中国充电桩通常依据GB标准而非IEC 61000系列进行认证，在IEC市场部署时需提供额外的EMC测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用基於OCPP或私有的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP信號，而非IEC 62196 Type 2所要求的PP/CP信號。在EMC方面，中國充電樁通常依據GB標準而非IEC 61000系列進行認證，在IEC市場部署時需提供額外的EMC測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC standards (GB series) — not equivalent to IEC 61000 series for IEC-market documentation

gap.en: Exporters targeting Congo-Brazzaville deployments must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP at a version compatible with the intended charge-point operator or project platform; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (3) IEC 61000 series EMC test evidence is available from an accredited laboratory, separate from Chinese GB EMC certifications; (4) remote monitoring and fault-reporting functions meet project operator requirements. As Congo-Brazzaville has no national charging platform, OCPP version and back-office integration should be specified in the project contract before shipment. GB-only EMC documentation is insufficient for IEC-market project acceptance.
gap.zh: 针对刚果（布）部署的出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持与目标充电点运营商或项目平台兼容版本的OCPP；(2) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 从认可实验室取得IEC 61000系列EMC测试证据，与中国GB EMC认证分开提供；(4) 远程监控和故障报告功能符合项目运营商要求。由于刚果（布）尚无国家充电平台，OCPP版本和后台集成应在出货前写入项目合同。仅凭GB体系EMC文件不足以满足IEC市场项目验收要求。
gap.zht: 針對剛果（布）部署的出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持與目標充電點運營商或項目平台兼容版本的OCPP；(2) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 從認可實驗室取得IEC 61000系列EMC測試證據，與中國GB EMC認證分開提供；(4) 遠程監控和故障報告功能符合項目運營商要求。由於剛果（布）尚無國家充電平台，OCPP版本和後台集成應在出貨前寫入項目合同。僅憑GB體系EMC文件不足以滿足IEC市場項目驗收要求。

mandatory_status.target: Expected for networked chargers — OCPP is the international standard for back-office communication consistent with IEC/Francophone market practice; no confirmed national mandate as of 2026-06-14 given the absence of an EV charging network in Congo-Brazzaville; IEC 61000 EMC compliance expected for any electrical equipment import
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible; China GB EMC certifications do not substitute for IEC 61000 series evidence in IEC-aligned markets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Congo-Brazzaville has no national charging management platform as of 2026. For any networked charger project, OCPP implementation is the expected international baseline and should be specified in the project contract. GB/T 27930 DC communication is not OCPP-compatible. Obtain IEC 61000 EMC test evidence from an accredited laboratory separately from China GB EMC documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年，刚果（布）尚无国家充电管理平台。对于任何联网充电桩项目，OCPP实现是预期的国际基线，应在项目合同中明确规定。GB/T 27930直流通信与OCPP不兼容。应从认可实验室单独取得IEC 61000 EMC测试证据，与中国GB EMC文件分开提供。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年，剛果（布）尚無國家充電管理平台。對於任何聯網充電樁項目，OCPP實現是預期的國際基線，應在項目合同中明確規定。GB/T 27930直流通訊與OCPP不兼容。應從認可實驗室單獨取得IEC 61000 EMC測試證據，與中國GB EMC文件分開提供。
